chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl: Misc. Appln. No. D- 18 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case. 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case. 30.07.2025 Mr. Nadeem Ahmed Malik, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, DPG for the State along with SIP Dhani Bux Bhutto on behalf of SSP, Sukkur and SIP Muhammad Ali, SHO Site Area, Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< Statements have been filed on behalf of respondents No.1 and 2, which are taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned Counsel for the applicant. Counsel for the applicant under instructions does not wish to press the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
